title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: The Workflow to Build BEAUTIFUL Frontends
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a multi-model workflow that routes planning and reasoning tasks to Claude Opus while using Gemini 3.5 Flash for frontend design and UI generation. The approach leverages handoff documents to coordinate between models, treating each phase as a specialized task routed to the model best suited for it.
